How it's made

From bean
to jar.

Most chocolate starts with someone else's work. We start at the beginning — raw cacao beans from a single farm, roasted, cracked, winnowed, and stone-ground in small batches. Every step is ours. Every batch is small enough to care about.

01 / SourceOrigin

Single-origin cacao sourced direct through specialty importers with full farm traceability.

02 / HeatRoast

Beans roasted in-house to develop full flavour. Profile varies by origin — each bean has its own ideal curve.

03 / SeparateCrack & Winnow

Roasted beans cracked and winnowed — husks removed to reveal pure cacao nibs.

04 / RefineStone Grind

Nibs stone-ground in our melanger 24–48 hours with coconut sugar into silky couverture.

05 / FinishCraft Ganache

Couverture meets cream, honey, and flavour — jarred by hand and kept cold. Nothing artificial. Ever.

The lineup

Three flavours.
One obsession.

Small-batch. Single-origin couverture. No refined sugars.
Kept refrigerated. 133g · 4.7oz · $16 · All contain dairy.

01 · White Chocolate

Matcha Sesame

White Chocolate Ganache

$16Milk · Hazelnut
03 · Milk + White

Bananas Foster

Milk + White Chocolate Ganache

Brown butter, dark rum, coconut caramel, and banana. A classic dessert, reimagined.

$16Milk · Alcohol (rum)

The story

Small batch.
From scratch.
Always.

SMÅSH GANACHE started with an obsession — knowing exactly where chocolate comes from, what goes into it, and why most of it settles for less. Small batches, every time, so nothing is ever made on autopilot.

We built a process that starts at the very beginning. Raw cacao beans. A stone grinder. Coconut sugar. No refined sugars, no shortcuts, no ingredients we cannot trace back to a farm.

The result is ganache that tastes like the chocolate it came from — complex, alive, and honest.

SPOON.SMÅSH.REPEAT

100%Single origin
ZeroRefined sugars
B2JBean to jar
3Core flavours

Ethically sourced cacao

Every batch starts with beans from farms we can name, sourced through importers who work with growers on fair terms.

No refined sugars. Ever.

Sweetened only with coconut sugar, raw honey, and agave — because it tastes better and sits better with our values.

Kept cold for a reason

No preservatives means refrigeration. Cold because nothing artificial is keeping it stable — that is a feature, not an inconvenience.

Where we make it

Made in small batches in British Columbia — where every jar is produced by hand, with full control over every step from bean to jar.

Order online

Get your jar.

Cold pack shipping across BC. Kept cold from our kitchen to your door.

Cold Chain

All orders packed with ice in insulated packaging. BC-wide cold pack shipping available — orders before noon ship same day. Refrigerate on receipt.

Small-batch, single-origin ganache made from scratch with no refined sugars, no shortcuts, and no compromises. Kept cold because there is nothing artificial in here. Spoon. Smash. Repeat.
